fields.title: Redesign Ralph iteration handshake around continue/finish tools
fields.description: Replace Ralph's split completion contract (`ralph_done` plus `<promise>COMPLETE</promise>`) with a tool-only handshake. Use separate continue and finish tools, store explicit pending decision state, remove the XML completion marker, and recover when a child iteration ends without a handshake tool.
fields.design: Expose `ralph_continue()` and `ralph_finish({ message })` only in active Ralph child sessions. Record a pending Ralph decision in loop state, let the controller consume it after `agent_end`, and use a one-time follow-up nudge when an iteration ends with stopReason stop/length without a Ralph handshake tool. Pause on repeated misses, errors, or aborts. Keep session creation/switching command-owned and avoid sendUserMessage races by re-arming the waiter before nudging.
fields.acceptance_criteria: Ralph no longer uses `<promise>COMPLETE</promise>` or `ralph_done`; active child sessions expose `ralph_continue` and `ralph_finish`; finish requires a message; the service consumes pending continue/finish decisions after child `agent_end`; a first normal stop without a Ralph handshake tool triggers a nudge and a second miss pauses the loop; regression tests cover continue, finish, nudge, and pause behavior.
